genesis_hash_note: Genesis sentinel changed from 'genesis' literal to '0'*64 on 2026-04-20 per cross-SDK fingerprint reconciliation (kailash-rs#449). Breaking change — chains rooted at the prior sentinel will not verify. Canonical across all Kailash SDKs per EATP D6.
metadata_canonicalisation: Compact JSON separators (',', ':'), sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=True. Matches Rust serde_json::to_string(&BTreeMap) output byte-for-byte. Python emitters MUST use json.dumps(meta, sort_keys=True, separators=(',', ':'), ensure_ascii=True, default=str).
